ques: Find a stainless steel kitchen sink with double bowls on Amazon. Sort the results and find the cheapest one with FREE delivery.
answer: The cheapest stainless steel double-bowl kitchen sink with FREE delivery is the "36 Inch Undermount Kitchen Sink, Stainless Steel Double Bowl (Reveal Rim, Brushed Finish, with Bottom Grids & Dual Drain Assembly)" priced at $94.49 with FREE delivery — found after sorting by Price: Low to High and applying the Free Shipping filter.
